calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTHEW MCFETRIGE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Off calendar. Moving party has not filed a proof of service showing service of the motion on the opposing party. Moreover, the motion is set for hearing on the fourteenth court day after filing, which is insufficient notice under CCP 1005(b)

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
